productDisplayName: Converse Unisex CT Stitch Print HI Yellow Canvas Shoe
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs. Arty with its stitch print, this pair is an absolutely stylish addition to your wardrobe. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability High ankle for added comfort to the foot and leg Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Midsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains  shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water   Dedicated to basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from Converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs.
